mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( meetup_id, member_id, content, rating, is_public ) VALUES ( #{meetupId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, #{rating}, IF(#{isPublic} = 1, 'Y', 'N') )
mapper.select: SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, rating, likes_count AS likesCount, views_count AS viewsCount, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews WHERE meetup_id = #{meetupId} AND is_public = 'Y' AND delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, rating, likes_count AS likesCount, views_count AS viewsCount, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews WHERE is_public = 'Y' AND delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY likes_count DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE reviews SET content = #{content}, rating = #{rating},
is_public = 'Y'
is_public = 'N'
WHERE review_id = #{id} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.select:
SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, rating, likes_count AS likesCount, views_count AS viewsCount, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
ORDER BY likes_count DESC, created_at DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, rating, likes_count AS likesCount, views_count AS viewsCount, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews WHERE content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_likes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_likes (review_id, member_id, created_at) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{memberId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM review_likes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET likes_count = likes_count + 1 WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET likes_count = IF(likes_count > 0, likes_count - 1, 0) WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT likes_count FROM reviews WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, rating, likes_count AS likesCount, views_count AS viewsCount, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews WHERE delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, rating, likes_count AS likesCount, views_count AS viewsCount, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews WHERE content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND delete_yn = 'N'

SELECT review_id AS id, meetup_id AS meetupId, member_id AS memberId, content, rating, likes_count AS likesCount, views_count AS viewsCount, IF(is_public = 'Y', 1, 0) AS isPublic, IF(delete_yn = 'Y', 1, 0) AS deleteYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reviews WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
